item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-doc-exception-loop","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested fourth local patch, identifies the repeated same-class repair pattern across refund/exchange/gift/invoice exceptions, reframes the issue as a failing exception-boundary documentation mechanism, and redirects upstream to consolidation into a unified boundary-rules section. It proposes structural consolidation/rewrite and only allows a temporary short note under an explicit merge-and-refactor constraint, so it does not exhibit the fail signal of simply adding another exception paragraph."}
